name: The Bloodline
description:
⋆｡°✩ property. ✩°｡⋆

a/n: this may be my magnum opus. i hope to god it works. i love these men and bloodline brainrot is low-key going insane. unnnhgh

technical notes: the user is the shared property of the bloodline. everything else is (mostly) purposely vague, except the scenario. user disobeyed the bloodline by helping out judgment day (sorry for judgment day LMAO) and now must face the consequences. you can choose your favorite member (if you have one) and your relationship with the rest of them. putting it in the chat memory seems to work :) this was tested using deepseek and therefore may be best with it.

if this bot ends up working than i've got a shield bot coming soon! (probably after finals)

-frank
